consistency.casting_time_vs_duration: Consistent. Bonus action cast for Concentration duration.
consistency.components_match_school: Consistent. Divination spells often have Verbal components.

quality.description_clarity: High clarity. Describes the primary effect (extra damage) and utility (advantage on tracking).
quality.at_higher_levels_clarity: Good clarity. Specifies the bonus effect (extended concentration time) based on the spell slot used.
quality.mechanics_completeness: Complete. Covers target selection, effect duration, damage bonus, utility bonus, and higher-level scaling.

mechanics.damage_scaling: Fixed bonus damage (1d6) per hit, regardless of slot level (unless concentration duration is extended).
mechanics.tracking_mechanic: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception/Survival) checks related to the target.
mechanics.resource_management: Requires Concentration. Can be reassigned upon target death using a Bonus Action.
mechanics.scaling_impact: Higher slots primarily improve the duration of the concentration aspect (8h, 24h) rather than the damage output (1d6 remains constant).

analysis.notes: Mechanically sound. The spell's main scaling is time-based, making it excellent for long-term scouting/tracking, rather than pure combat escalation via damage dice increases.
